content.text:
Now I have a clear zoomed-in view of atom C:31. From this visualization, I can clearly see that atom C:31 (carbon) is connected to:

- C:8 (carbon) - visible as an orange sphere directly bonded to C:31
- C:12 (carbon) - visible as another orange sphere directly bonded to C:31  
- H:34 (hydrogen) - visible as a white sphere directly bonded to C:31

I can confirm there are exactly 3 neighbor atoms connected to C:31. The connections are clearly visible in the 3D structure.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 271, as indicated by the file name "geomconf_271.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 31 (C) are:
- Atom index 8 (C)
- Atom index 12 (C)
- Atom index 34 (H)

geomconf_index: 271

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 31, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
